revisions.notes: Near green-field build — Danilo's 7 tabs had only ~50 unique rows with 3 near-duplicates. Google Optimize recommendation replaced. 3 research agents deployed (low-traffic testing methodology, Shopify tool landscape, creative testing frameworks). Produced 6 content files + OpKit + dialogue summary. Key innovations: two-stage kill criteria (leading indicators → conversion with 50+ click minimum), traffic-based methodology selection, tool-spend ≤5% discipline, passive audience learning from Meta breakdowns.

danilo_source_note: Tabs 379/380/381 were near-duplicates — consolidated into single ab_testing_framework.md. Tab 348 (M12 Creative Testing Protocol1) used as additional source for creative_testing_protocol.md.
